interpretation: Contract/backlog evidence can support Green only with quality, margin, and EPS/FCF revision.
AI infrastructure needs orders, bottleneck evidence, and revision support.
Export consumer/beauty evidence comes from channel, repeat demand, OPM, and revisions.
HBM needs multi-year demand, price/capacity discipline, and medium-term revision.
CDMO/medical device Green requires contract/utilization or repeat consumable revenue.
Financial rerating depends on ROE/PBR, capital strength, and executed return.
Platform/SW is Watch until monetization, recurring revenue, and margin leverage are visible.
Robotics requires revenue conversion before high-conviction treatment.
Nuclear/policy themes need binding contracts and low legal risk.
Auto needs mix, customer diversification, cost control, and sometimes shareholder return.
Retail/e-commerce needs OPM and FCF, not traffic or listing events alone.
Digital finance is Watch until regulation, volume, and fee economics are real.
Shipping can explode cyclically, so Green is highly restricted.
Commodity/spread cases need reversal and oversupply guards.
Battery themes require strong overheat and CAPA risk defense.
Construction is credit-risk first; relief rallies are not structural E2R.
One-off disease/event EPS spikes are usually Red/4B defense material.
Speculative science is Green-blocked until commercialization and revenue exist.
